ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Refund From Irs
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Continued To Feb-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler for Samson Kwong (Administration).

Mr. Bresler stated that the paper work is on its second trip in the e-file que, that the Administrator has distributed all except for $6,720.00 for taxes, that documents will be attached to show what has been paid, and that the tax refund was received and partially distributed. Status on filing of receipts for tax withholds is continued to February 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Anasse. Not reported.
